Initializes the module by importing and registering transport classes for the link interface.

# Purpose
This code defines public aliases and registers transport mechanisms for a communication interface. It imports modules `link` and `transports` and makes the `Interface` class from the `link` module available for direct use. The code registers two types of transport: `'best-effort'` and `'reliable'`, using the `BestEffortApplicationTransport` and `ReliableTransport` classes from the `transports` module, respectively. This setup allows users to select different transport strategies when using the `Interface` class.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `.link`
- `.transports`
- `.link.Interface`
